message:
Fix streaming parser root scalar whitespace termination bug

stream.zig: Root-level partial keywords (e.g. "tru ") and trailing
incomplete number chars (e.g. "1. ") followed by whitespace were
incorrectly marked as complete. Added isScalarComplete validation
before markRootComplete, with trailing whitespace stripping at EOF.

index.ts (ptScan/spScan): Root-level scalars terminated by whitespace
now stay pending in ldScalarAccum instead of being parsed immediately,
allowing getValue() to autocomplete them when status is incomplete.

index.ts (getValue): Added trailing incomplete number char stripping
("1." → "1", "1e-" → "1") to the incomplete scalar autocomplete path
in both createEventParser and createParser.
